# ProphetChef

> ProphetChef manufactures commercial induction cooking equipment, automatic cooking machines, steamers, fryers, griddles and specialty kitchen equipment for global foodservice projects.

## Site Structure

- [Home](https://www.prophetchef.com/) - Home page with product highlights, factory strength, core advantages, and trust tags.
- [Products](https://www.prophetchef.com/products) - Catalog of commercial induction cookers and cooking equipment.
- [Factory](https://www.prophetchef.com/factory) - Overview of our manufacturing capability, quality control, OEM/ODM processes, and production lines.
- [Applications](https://www.prophetchef.com/applications) - Kitchen solutions for restaurants, school canteens, marine kitchens, factories, and central kitchens.
- [Certificates](https://www.prophetchef.com/certificates) - Industrial and safety certifications (CE, CCC, etc.) ensuring global export compliance.
- [News](https://www.prophetchef.com/news) - Industry insights, product guides, and company announcements.
- [Contact](https://www.prophetchef.com/contact) - Contact form, email, phone, WhatsApp, and factory address details.

## Contact Information

- **Email**: service@prophetchef.com
- **Phone**: +86 18351834957
- **WhatsApp**: +86 18351834957
